source_pr.title: stats: close the priority queue DDL handler when auto-analyze is disabled
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed 
4. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/64038

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

1. If auto-analyze is disabled, we should close the priority queue and allow it to be re-enabled correctly later and also avoid to return retry later error here.
2. I also ignored errors that occur during handling DDL events to prevent them from blocking the ddl_notifier from being cleaned.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
修复 auto-anlyze 关闭之后 mysql.tidb_ddl_notifier 不能被清理的问题
Fix the issue where mysql.tidb_ddl_notifier cannot be cleaned up after auto-analyze is turned off
```

symptoms: Auto-analyze priority-queue tests were flaky when `tidb_enable_auto_analyze` was turned off: the DDL handler could keep the queue in an inconsistent state and block cleanup of the DDL notifier table, causing nondeterministic failures in later assertions/cleanup.
failure_signature: statistics auto-analyze: intermittent failures when auto-analyze disabled leaves priority queue not initialized / DDL notifier cleanup blocked (e.g. unexpected `priority queue not initialized` or notifier table not cleared)
root_cause_explanation: The flaky behavior was driven by global/shared state: when `tidb_enable_auto_analyze` is disabled, the auto-analyze priority queue can remain in an inconsistent/unknown state. Subsequent DDL events can then hit the “queue not initialized / retry later” path and block cleanup of the DDL notifier (`mysql.tidb_ddl_notifier`), which makes tests nondeterministic (depending on ordering/timing of DDL events and cleanup). This PR fixes it by explicitly closing the priority queue when auto-analyze is off and by ignoring DDL-handler errors to avoid infinite retries and allow notifier cleanup.
fix_pattern: When global auto-analyze is disabled, close the analysis priority queue to reset state and allow re-initialization; additionally, log-and-ignore DDL-handler errors to avoid infinite retries that block cleanup of `mysql.tidb_ddl_notifier`.
analysis:
PR title: stats: close the priority queue DDL handler when auto-analyze is disabled
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/64817
Triage sources: manual_triage, determinism_stabilization
Changed files (7): pkg/statistics/handle/autoanalyze/priorityqueue/BUILD.bazel, pkg/statistics/handle/autoanalyze/priorityqueue/queue_ddl_handler.go, pkg/statistics/handle/autoanalyze/priorityqueue/queue_ddl_handler_test.go, pkg/statistics/handle/autoanalyze/refresher/BUILD.bazel, pkg/statistics/handle/autoanalyze/refresher/refresher.go, pkg/statistics/handle/autoanalyze/refresher/refresher_test.go, pkg/statistics/handle/ddl/ddl.go
Manual review: tests can flake when global auto-analyze is turned off and the priority queue/DDLEvent handler leaves internal state and `mysql.tidb_ddl_notifier` cleanup in a bad state. The fix closes the queue when disabled and avoids infinite retries by logging-and-ignoring handler errors.
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
